name: Warrior Heroes: Arena Rumble
description: A multiplayer turn-based tactical strategy card game with real-time PvP, ranked progression, and dynamic reward systems.
highlights: Designed and built turn-based card gameplay, hero leveling systems, and character combat skills integrated with the backend.
Architected authoritative multiplayer synchronization using Mirror and AWS for server orchestration.
Developed custom backend services for user login, secure player data storage, in-app purchases (IAP), and server-validated loot chests.
